summary: Make better-sqlite3 dependency fail-open in ModelComprehensionMemory — prevents uncaught require errors from crashing bootstrap and integration tests when native dependency is unavailable
description: Make better-sqlite3 dependency fail-open in ModelComprehensionMemory — prevents uncaught require errors from crashing bootstrap and integration tests when native dependency is unavailable

details.root_cause: Top-level require('better-sqlite3') threw uncaught error when native dep unavailable, propagating through bootstrap and failing 3 integration tests
details.fix: Wrapped require in try-catch, added null guards on all public methods, initialize() returns early when Database unavailable — class operates in-memory-only mode
tests_fixed: model-router-wiring.test.js: ModelRouter receives skillRLManager reference via bootstrap
model-router-wiring.test.js: bootstrap injects runtime collaborators into ModelRouter when available
